Package neqsim.process.materials

Class MaterialsReviewEngine

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.materials.MaterialsReviewEngine
public class MaterialsReviewEngine extends Object
Process-wide materials selection, corrosion, degradation, and integrity review engine.

The engine orchestrates NeqSim's existing point calculators into one review workflow for projects and assets. It accepts normalized process/materials-register data, evaluates credible damage mechanisms, checks material compatibility, estimates remaining life when inspection data is available, and returns an auditable JSON-ready report.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

    • MaterialsReviewEngine

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public MaterialsReviewReport evaluate(MaterialsReviewInput input)
      Evaluates a normalized materials review input.
      Parameters:
      input - normalized review input
      Returns:
      materials review report

    • evaluate

      public MaterialsReviewReport evaluate(ProcessSystem process, MaterialsReviewInput input)
      Extracts process conditions from a process system, overlays material-register data, and evaluates the result.
      Parameters:
      process - process system supplying temperatures, pressures, and stream compositions
      input - optional material register and defaults to overlay by tag
      Returns:
      materials review report

    • evaluateItem

      private MaterialReviewResult evaluateItem(MaterialReviewItem item, double defaultDesignLifeYears)
      Evaluates one item.
      Parameters:
      item - material review item
      defaultDesignLifeYears - default design life in years
      Returns:
      item review result

    • runCo2Corrosion

      private NorsokM506CorrosionRate runCo2Corrosion(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, double temperatureC, double pressureBara, double co2MoleFraction, double h2sMoleFraction, double chlorideMgL, double pH, boolean freeWater)
      Runs NORSOK M-506 CO2 corrosion when relevant.
      Parameters:
      service - service envelope
      result - item result
      temperatureC - operating temperature in Celsius
      pressureBara - operating pressure in bara
      co2MoleFraction - CO2 mole fraction
      h2sMoleFraction - H2S mole fraction
      chlorideMgL - chloride concentration in mg/L
      pH - aqueous pH
      freeWater - true when free water is present
      Returns:
      configured and calculated corrosion model

    • runMaterialSelection

      private void runMaterialSelection(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, NorsokM506CorrosionRate co2Corrosion, double designTemperatureC, double designLifeYears, double chlorideMgL, double pH, boolean freeWater)
      Runs NORSOK M-001 material selection and stores the recommendation.
      Parameters:
      service - service envelope
      result - item result
      co2Corrosion - calculated CO2 corrosion model
      designTemperatureC - design temperature in Celsius
      designLifeYears - design life in years
      chlorideMgL - chloride concentration in mg/L
      pH - aqueous pH
      freeWater - true when free water is present

    • runSourService

      private void runSourService(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double pressureBara, double co2MoleFraction, double h2sMoleFraction, double chlorideMgL, double pH, boolean freeWater)
      Runs sour-service assessment.
      Parameters:
      service - service envelope
      result - item result
      material - material grade/type
      temperatureC - temperature in Celsius
      pressureBara - pressure in bara
      co2MoleFraction - CO2 mole fraction
      h2sMoleFraction - H2S mole fraction
      chlorideMgL - chloride concentration in mg/L
      pH - aqueous pH
      freeWater - true when free water is present

      result - item result
      co2Corrosion - CO2 corrosion model supplying default corrosion rate
